zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh Lowther於1461年8月15日出生在英國維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素時，他的父親Hugh Lowther32歲，母親Mabel Lancaster25歲。他和Ann Threlkeld至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1510年4月24日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比 聖 邁克爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh Lowther于1461年8月15日出生在英国維斯特莫藍德洛福黑 卡素时，他的父亲Hugh Lowther32岁，母亲Mabel Lancaster25岁。他和Ann Threlkeld至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1510年4月24日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国維斯特莫藍德阿波萊比 聖 邁克爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lowther
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so called from the river on which it stands. The placename is of obscure etymology, perhaps of ancient Welsh origin (compare Lauder ), or from Old Norse lauthr ‘froth, foam’ + á ‘river’.

variants.name: Lawther
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and northern English: variant of   Lowther   and   Lauder  .

variants.name: Lauder
meanings: Scottish (Borders): habitational name from Lauder in Berwickshire, originally a name for the river Leader (itself from British lou- + dubro- ‘cleansing river’). Compare Lauderdale .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh Lowther was born on 15 August 1461, in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, his father, Hugh Lowther, was 32 and his mother, Mabel Lancaster, was 25. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Ann Threlkeld. He died on 24 April 1510, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh Lowther est né le 15 août 1461, à Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Lowther, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mabel Lancaster, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Ann Threlkeld. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1510, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh Lowther am 15. August 1461 in Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Lowther 32 und seine Mutter Mabel Lancaster 25. Er hatte mit Ann Threlkeld mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. April 1510 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Lowther è nato il il 15 agosto 1461 nel Lowther Castle, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Hugh Lowther, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mabel Lancaster, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Ann Threlkeld. Morì il 24 aprile 1510, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowtherが1461年8月15日にイギリスウエストモーランドロウスエル カストルで生まれた時，父Hugh Lowtherは32歳，母Mabel Lancasterは25歳であった。彼はAnn Threlkeldとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1510年4月24日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスウエストモーランドアップレビー スト ミチャエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh Lowther(이)가 1461년 8월 15일 영국 웨스트모를랜드 로터 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Lowther(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel Lancaster(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Ann Threlkeld(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 4월 24일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨스트모를랜드 애플레비 스트 믹하얼에 묻혔다.

pt.15 August 1461–24 April 1510: 15 de agosto de 1461–24 de abril de 1510
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh Lowther nasceu em 15 de agosto de 1461, em Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Lowther, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Lancaster, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Ann Threlkeld. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1510, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh Lowther родился 15 августа 1461 г. в местности лоутир кастл, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Lowther было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel Lancaster, 25. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Ann Threlkeld. Он умер 24 апреля 1510 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности эпплеби ст мачаел, вестморланд, Англия.

es.15 August 1461–24 April 1510: 15 de agosto de 1461–24 de abril de 1510
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh Lowther nació el 15 de agosto de 1461, en Lowther Castle, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Lowther, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mabel Lancaster, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Ann Threlkeld. Murió el 24 de abril de 1510, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Appleby St Michael, Westmorland, Inglaterra.
